goal: Fix card border-radius globally and tighten shared header padding + text sizes
summary: Phase 1 completed successfully. Updated .card border-radius to 1rem (rounded-2xl) in globals.css, tightened mobile header padding in app layout, and converted all arbitrary text sizes in Sidebar and SidebarNav to standard Tailwind utilities. Build passes cleanly.
stepSummaries:
1. Update `.card` in globals.css: change `border-radius: var(--radius)` to `border-radius: 1rem` [verified]
  2. Fix mobile header padding in app/(app)/layout.tsx: px-4 py-3 → px-3 py-2, adjust top positioning if needed [verified]
  3. Convert text-[16px] → text-base in components/Sidebar.tsx logo [verified]
  4. Convert text-[10px] → text-xs in components/SidebarNav.tsx mobile labels [verified]
  5. Run build to verify no errors [verified]

flags.redirect: Wire lint properly before completing this phase — make `npm run lint` a real, installable command (resolve the runner, fix the script).

reviewerRationale: 1 block flag(s) raised — see attached gate verdicts and project checks.
